### Summary

Brief description of the change.

### Type of change

- [ ] Editorial (typo, clarification, broken link)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs/`, `README.md`)
- [ ] New or revised test vector
- [ ] New or revised JSON Schema
- [ ] Cryptographic or wire-format change
- [ ] Other

### Linked issues

Closes #...

### Checklist

- [ ] I have read `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
- [ ] If this is a normatively visible change, I have updated `CHANGELOG.md`.
- [ ] If this touches schemas or vectors, the local validation tooling (ajv-cli, and the abnf parse-check for `wire.abnf`) passes.
- [ ] If this is a cryptographic or wire-format change, I have linked a prior issue with maintainer sign-off.
- [ ] I agree to license my contribution under CC-BY-4.0 (prose) or Apache-2.0 (schemas/vectors), matching the corresponding parts of the repository.
